sentences.arabic: تَرْتَكِزُ عَقِيدَةُ أَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ عَلَى تَوْحِيدِ اللهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ فِي رُبُوبِيَّتِهِ وَأُلُوهِيَّتِهِ وَأَسْمَائِهِ وَصِفَاتِهِ، وَهُوَ أَصْلُ الدِّينِ الَّذِي أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ الرُّسُلُ.
sentences.translation: Akida ehli-sunneta i džemata zasniva se na tevudu (jedinstvu) Allaha u Njegovom gospodarenju, božanstvenosti, te Njegovim imenima i svojstvima, a to je osnova vjere s kojom su slani poslanici.
sentences.translationEn: The creed of Ahl al-Sunnah wal-Jama'ah is centered on the Oneness of Allah (Tawhid) in His Lordship, Divinity, and His Names and Attributes, which is the foundation of the religion with which the Messengers were sent.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ بَيَّنَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ حَقَّ اللهِ عَلَى الْعِبَادِ فِي حَدِيثِ مُعَاذِ بْنِ جَبَلٍ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ حِينَ قَالَ لَهُ: «يَا مُعَاذُ، أَتَدْرِي مَا حَقُّ اللهِ عَلَى الْعِبَادِ؟» قَالَ: اللهُ وَرَسُولُهُ أَعْلَمُ، قَالَ: «أَنْ يَعْبُدُوهُ وَلَا يُشْرِكُوا بِهِ شَيْئًا» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ التَّوْحِيدِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ٧٣٧٣].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik je pojasnio Allahovo pravo kod robova u hadisu Muaza ibn Džebela kada mu je rekao: 'O Muaze, znaš li ti šta je Allahovo pravo kod robova?' Rekao je: 'Allah i Njegov Poslanik najbolje znaju.' Rekao je: 'Da Ga obožavaju i da Mu ništa ne pridružuju' [Buhari, 7373].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet clarified Allah's right over His servants in the hadith of Mu'adh ibn Jabal when he said to him: 'O Mu'adh, do you know what is the right of Allah over His servants?' He said: 'Allah and His Messenger know best.' He said: 'That they worship Him and associate nothing with Him' [Bukhari, 7373].

sentences.arabic: هَذَا النَّصُّ الْعَظِيمُ يُؤَسِّسُ لِلْعَلَاقَةِ الْجَوْهَرِيَّةِ بَيْنَ الْخَالِقِ وَالْمَخْلُوقِ، حَيْثُ الْعِبَادَةُ هِيَ الْغَايَةُ مِنَ الْإِيجَادِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj veličanstveni tekst utemeljuje suštinski odnos između Stvoritelja i stvorenja, gdje je ibadet svrha postojanja.
sentences.translationEn: This great text establishes the essential relationship between the Creator and the created, where worship is the purpose of existence.

sentences.arabic: وَيَشْرَحُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ بَازٍ رَحِمَهُ اللهُ أَنَّ التَّوْحِيدَ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ كَلِمَةٍ تُقَالُ بِاللِّسَانِ، بَلْ هُوَ اعْتِقَادٌ جَازِمٌ يَتْبَعُهُ عَمَلٌ بِالْجَوَارِحِ وَتَرْكٌ لِلشِّرْكِ بِجَمِيعِ أَنْوَاعِهِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Baz, Allah mu se smilovao, objašnjava da tevhid nije samo riječ koja se izgovara jezikom, već čvrsto uvjerenje koje prati rad udova i ostavljanje širka (mnogoboštva) u svim njegovim oblicima.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Baz, may Allah have mercy on him, explains that Tawhid is not merely a word spoken by the tongue, but a firm belief followed by the actions of the limbs and the abandonment of all forms of polytheism (Shirk).

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُسْلِمُ الْحَقُّ هُوَ مَنْ يُفْرِدُ اللهَ بِالدُّعَاءِ وَالذَّبْحِ وَالنَّذْرِ وَالْخَوْفِ وَالرَّجَاءِ، فَلَا يَلْتَفِتُ قَلْبُهُ إِلَى غَيْرِ بَارِئِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pravi musliman je onaj koji samo Allaha izdvaja u dovi, kurbanu, zavjetu, strahu i nadi, te se njegovo srce ne okreće nikome osim svom Stvoritelju.
sentences.translationEn: A true Muslim is one who singles out Allah in supplication, sacrifice, vows, fear, and hope, so that his heart does not turn to anyone other than his Creator.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَحْقِيقَ التَّوْحِيدِ يُورِثُ الْأَمْنَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْهِدَايَةَ فِي الْآخِرَةِ، وَيُحَرِّمُ صَاحِبَهُ عَلَى النَّارِ إِذَا مَاتَ عَلَيْهِ خَالِصًا مِنْ قَلْبِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ostvarenje tevhida donosi sigurnost na dunjaluku i uputu na ahiretu, te zabranjuje vatru onome ko umre na njemu iskreno iz srca.
sentences.translationEn: Realizing Tawhid brings security in this world and guidance in the hereafter, and it forbids the Fire for its possessor if they die upon it sincerely from the heart.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ كَانَ لِزَامًا عَلَى كُلِّ مُكَلَّفٍ تَعَلُّمُ مَعَانِي التَّوْحِيدِ وَنَوَاقِضِهِ لِيَسْلَمَ دِينُهُ وَيَصِحَّ إِيمَانُهُ.
sentences.translation: Zato je obaveza svakom punoljetnom da nauči značenja tevhida i ono što ga kvari kako bi mu vjera bila sačuvana a iman ispravan.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, it is mandatory for every accountable person to learn the meanings of Tawhid and its nullifiers so that their religion remains safe and their faith correct.
